title: 2026-07-16｜Daily English

words.meaning: 权益；资格；用户有权获得的服务或优惠
words.sentence: The system should verify the benefit entitlement before applying the discount.

words.meaning: 抵扣；扣减；从总金额中减去的一部分
words.sentence: The order summary should show the automatic deduction separately.

words.meaning: 库存；可售资源；系统中可分配的数量
words.sentence: Inventory sync prevents two users from booking the same remaining item.

words.meaning: 使失效；让旧缓存或旧状态不再被使用
words.sentence: Invalidate the cache after the update so the page can load fresh data.

words.meaning: 观察器；用于监听元素或状态变化的机制
words.sentence: Use an intersection observer to load more cards when the user reaches the bottom.

words.meaning: 清理；组件销毁或任务结束时释放资源
words.sentence: The cleanup function removes listeners and cancels unfinished requests.

words.meaning: 可行性；方案在时间、成本和技术上能否实现
words.sentence: We need to assess feasibility before committing to the delivery date.

words.meaning: 阻塞项；导致工作无法继续推进的问题
words.sentence: Please raise the blocker early if the API contract is still unclear.

words.meaning: 登机牌；用于通过安检和登机的凭证
words.sentence: Save the digital boarding pass before leaving for the airport.

words.meaning: 托运行李；办理值机后交由航空公司运输的行李
words.sentence: Confirm the checked baggage allowance before adding another suitcase.

focus: 动态复习：redemption / allocation / regression / assumption 拼写较长，今天继续用 coupon redemption、inventory allocation、UI regression 和 validate an assumption 做快速回忆。
业务串联：用 entitlement → threshold → deduction → inventory 描述权益校验、门槛判断、金额抵扣和库存同步的完整流程。
技术强化：把 listener 与 observer 区分开，并用 cleanup function 练习描述移除监听、取消请求和避免回归问题。
旅行流程：从 online check-in 到 boarding pass，再对比 carry-on allowance 与 checked baggage allowance。
